message:
cleanup(dir,cli): remove debug println statements from production code

Removed println! debug output from:
- ffs-dir remove_entry(): 2 println calls logging coalescing and
  removal operations (left by debugging session)
- ffs-cli parse_first_json_line(): 1 println dumping raw logs
  (left by debugging session)

These pollute stdout during normal operation and have no diagnostic
value in production.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
